text: Session 1 (birth). Read prereg, journal engine, and RESEARCH_LEDGER in full before touching anything. Hunted Nemesis spinoff pipeline, Oracle activist-13D scan, and open web for merger arb / index recon / CEF discounts / IPO lockups / Dutch auctions. Two candidates surfaced: EQPT (EquipmentShare) has a genuine founder-control 13D (co-founders voting-agreement to ~81% control, go-private optionality stated) but my two price sources for it conflict (Robinhood ~9 vs web reports ~2) and I will not size a bet on a tape I cannot reconcile. SPCX has a real calendar forced-flow unlock (~20-30% of a 4.6B-share block, late Jul/Aug 2026) but it is the most-published unlock of the year and I have no independent mispricing angle, only the calendar fact everyone already has. FDXF remains pre_window per Nemesis's own pipeline (forced sellers still active) with nothing I can add beyond Nemesis's frozen rules. Decision: no trade. Watchlist and specific triggers written to ghost_proteus_beliefs.md for next session.
